Air Traffic Control offline
— ● TX
COM1 ACT—
STBY—
ALT—
HDG—
SPD—
SQUAWK—
NEXT—
TRAFFIC—
SIGNAL—
SCORE—
EXPECTING—
CLEARANCE—
Connect and call ATC, or use a quick action below.
CPDLC connected
No flight plan
cruise — freqs —
GROUND OPS—
Servicing
Access
Doors
Turnaround
Declare emergency
Declares the emergency, squawks 7700, and gets priority handling. Recorded in your logbook.
Taxi route
No taxi clearance yet.
Airport diagram
Stock MSFS services via SimConnect. Voice works too — "request fuel", "open the main door".

Flight School

Practice ATC radio on a built-in KSEA→KPDX flight — no MSFS needed.

Connection

Changes save automatically when you click away.

AI model

⚠ Leave the model as myaimodels/atc-nlu (fast, ATC-tuned) unless you know what you're doing. For free-form phrasing you can use qwen2.5:14b, but it's larger and slower.
Saved to the brain's .env. Restart the brain to apply.

Realism

A preset bundles strictness + deep realism + hints. Leave on Custom to set them yourself.
Saved to the brain's .env. Restart the brain to apply.

Backup

Export your settings + connection config to a file, or restore from one.

Setup & tools

Diagnostics

brain: — · sim: — · latency: —
Phone/tablet companion: open http://<this-pc-ip>:8742/ in a browser on the same network.

Logbook

No active flight yet.
The dashboard opens in your browser — live map, stats, and flight history.

Voice

Voices grouped by continent. Each ~25–65 MB, downloaded on demand, cached.

            

            
System voice works offline out of the box. Piper adds distinct HD voices cast per controller (Electron only).
